name: Travis House Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Add brown sugar to egg white and continue stirring until combined.
2. Stir in flour and salt until a dough forms.
3. Gently fold in chopped pecans, forming small mounds of cookie dough.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture far apart on a buttered baking sheet.
5. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
6. Remove from the sheet when slightly cool.
This is a tea party cookie.
